translations.it: La mia routine quotidiana mi rassicura.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的日常作息让我安心。
translations.yue: 我嘅日常作息令我安心。
translations.vi: Thói quen hằng ngày khiến tôi yên tâm.
translations.nl: Mijn dagelijkse routine stelt me gerust.
translations.hi: मेरी दैनिक दिनचर्या मुझे आश्वस्त करती है.
translations.el: Η καθημερινή μου ρουτίνα με καθησυχάζει.
translations.ja: 毎日の習慣は私を安心させる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), feminine singular; modifies the head noun 'routine' in the subject noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular; agrees with and modifies 'routine'.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object placed before the finite verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'Ma routine quotidienne'.

sentences.target: Ils parlent de leur routine quotidienne au café.
sentences.reading: /il paʁl də lœʁ ʁu.tin kɔ.ti.djɛn o ka.fe/

translations.fr: Ils parlent de leur routine quotidienne au café.
translations.ipa: /il paʁl də lœʁ ʁu.tin kɔ.ti.djɛn o ka.fe/
translations.en: They talk about their daily routine at the café.
translations.es: Hablan de su rutina diaria en la cafetería.
translations.de: Sie sprechen im Café über ihren Tagesablauf.
translations.it: Parlano della loro routine quotidiana al bar.
translations.ko: 그들은 카페에서 자신의 일상에 대해 이야기한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在咖啡馆谈论他们的日常作息。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺咖啡店傾偈講佢哋嘅日常作息。
translations.ru: Они в кафе обсуждают свою ежедневную рутину.
translations.pt: Eles falam sobre sua rotina diária no café.
translations.he: הם מדברים על השגרה היומיומית שלהם בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Họ nói về thói quen hằng ngày của họ ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: يتحدثون عن روتينهم اليومي في المقهى.
translations.nl: Ze praten in het café over hun dagelijkse routine.
translations.uk: Вони говорять про свою щоденну рутину в кав'ярні.
translations.hu: A kávézóban a napi rutinjukról beszélnek.
translations.hi: वे कैफ़े में अपनी दैनिक दिनचर्या के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.pl: Rozmawiają o swojej codziennej rutynie w kawiarni.
translations.el: Μιλούν για την καθημερινή τους ρουτίνα στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: De snakker om sin daglige rutine på kafeen.
translations.id: Mereka membicarakan rutinitas harian mereka di kafe.
translations.sv: De pratar om sin dagliga rutin på kaféet.
translations.ro: Ei vorbesc despre rutina lor zilnică la cafenea.
translations.cs: V kavárně mluví o své každodenní rutině.
translations.da: De taler om deres daglige rutine på caféen.
translations.ja: 彼らはカフェで毎日のルーティンについて話す。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the verb 'parlent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes a 'de'-marked complement and a locative complement.
Preposition introducing the complement 'de leur routine quotidienne'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person), singular possessee; modifies 'routine' within the 'de'-phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the 'de'-complement.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'routine'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces the locative complement 'au café'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the prepositional phrase 'au café' indicating location.

sentences.target: Ce journal quotidien couvre la région.

translations.fr: Ce journal quotidien couvre la région.
translations.en: This daily newspaper covers the region.
translations.de: Diese Tageszeitung berichtet über die Region.
translations.yue: 呢份日報報道呢個地區。
translations.pt: Este jornal diário cobre a região.
translations.he: העיתון היומי הזה מסקר את האזור.
translations.vi: Tờ báo ra hằng ngày này đưa tin về khu vực.
translations.nl: Dit dagblad bericht over de regio.
translations.hu: Ez a napilap tudósít a régióról.
translations.hi: यह दैनिक अखबार इस क्षेत्र को कवर करता है.
translations.pl: Ten dziennik relacjonuje wydarzenia w regionie.
translations.el: Αυτή η καθημερινή εφημερίδα καλύπτει την περιοχή.
translations.id: Koran harian ini meliput wilayah tersebut.
translations.ja: この日刊紙はその地域を報道している。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'journal'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'journal'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting the direct object 'la région'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'région'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'couvre'.

sentences.target: Mon rythme quotidien change avec le bébé.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ ʁitm kɔ.ti.djɛ̃ ʃɑ̃ʒ a.vɛk lə be.be/

translations.fr: Mon rythme quotidien change avec le bébé.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ ʁitm kɔ.ti.djɛ̃ ʃɑ̃ʒ a.vɛk lə be.be/
translations.en: My daily rhythm changes with the baby.
translations.es: Mi ritmo diario cambia con el bebé.
translations.de: Mein täglicher Rhythmus ändert sich mit dem Baby.
translations.it: Il mio ritmo quotidiano cambia con il bambino.
translations.ko: 아기와 함께 내 일상의 리듬이 달라진다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的日常节奏随着宝宝而变化。
translations.yue: 有咗BB之後，我每日嘅節奏會改變。
translations.ru: Мой ежедневный ритм меняется с появлением малыша.
translations.pt: Meu ritmo diário muda com o bebê.
translations.he: הקצב היומי שלי משתנה עם התינוק.
translations.vi: Nhịp sống hằng ngày của tôi thay đổi theo em bé.
translations.nl: Mijn dagelijkse ritme verandert met de baby.
translations.uk: Мій щоденний ритм змінюється з появою немовляти.
translations.hu: A napi ritmusom a babával együtt változik.
translations.hi: बच्चे के साथ मेरी दैनिक लय बदलती है.
translations.pl: Mój codzienny rytm zmienia się wraz z dzieckiem.
translations.el: Ο καθημερινός μου ρυθμός αλλάζει με το μωρό.
translations.nb: Min daglige rytme endrer seg med babyen.
translations.id: Ritme harian saya berubah seiring dengan bayi.
translations.sv: Min dagliga rytm förändras med bebisen.
translations.ro: Ritmul meu zilnic se schimbă odată cu bebelușul.
translations.cs: Můj denní rytmus se mění s miminkem.
translations.da: Min daglige rytme ændrer sig med babyen.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんと一緒だと私の毎日のリズムが変わる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), masculine singular; modifies 'rythme'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'rythme'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here, with a comitative/associative complement introduced by 'avec'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'avec le bébé'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'bébé'.
Common noun, masculine (invariable form), singular; head of the prepositional complement 'avec le bébé'.
